title: जगन्नाथ गायत्री
devanagariText:
॥ श्री जगन्नाथ गायत्री ॥

ॐ जगन्नाथाय विद्महे पुरुषोत्तमाय धीमहि।
तन्नो जगन्नाथः प्रचोदयात्॥

ॐ नीलाद्रिवासाय विद्महे विश्वरूपाय धीमहि।
तन्नो जगन्नाथः प्रचोदयात्॥

ॐ दारुब्रह्माय विद्महे सुभद्रासहजाय धीमहि।
तन्नो जगन्नाथः प्रचोदयात्॥

॥ इति श्री जगन्नाथ गायत्री सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Jagannath Gayatri ||

Om Jagannathaya Vidmahe Purushottamaya Dhimahi.
Tanno Jagannathah Prachodayat.

Om Niladrivasaya Vidmahe Vishwarupaya Dhimahi.
Tanno Jagannathah Prachodayat.

Om Darubrahmaaya Vidmahe Subhadrasahajaya Dhimahi.
Tanno Jagannathah Prachodayat.

|| Iti Shri Jagannath Gayatri Sampoornam ||
hindiMeaning: हम जगन्नाथ (जगत के स्वामी), पुरुषोत्तम (परम पुरुष) का ध्यान करते हैं, भगवान जगन्नाथ हमारी बुद्धि को सन्मार्ग पर प्रेरित करें। हम नीलाद्रि (नीलगिरि/पुरी) में विराजमान, विश्वरूप जगन्नाथ का ध्यान करते हैं। हम दारुब्रह्म (काष्ठ में ब्रह्म स्वरूप), सुभद्रा के सहोदर जगन्नाथ का ध्यान करते हैं, वे हमें प्रेरणा प्रदान करें। जगन्नाथ गायत्री भगवान जगन्नाथ की कृपा और मोक्ष प्राप्ति के लिए अत्यन्त फलदायी है।
benefits: Invokes the supreme blessings of Lord Jagannath
Invokes the blessing of liberation (moksha) and spiritual wisdom
Traditionally associated with prosperity, happiness, and divine grace
Classical tradition invokes this for removal of sins and purifies the devotee
Especially powerful during Rath Yatra and Puri pilgrimage
description: Among the most cherished prayers to Lord Jagannath, Jagannath Gayatri (जगन्नाथ गायत्री) stands as a powerful Vedic meditation mantra. This sacred composition is sourced from Skanda Purana and continues to inspire devotees worldwide. Regular recitation is believed to invoke the supreme blessings of Lord Jagannath, bestow liberation (moksha) and spiritual wisdom, and bring prosperity, happiness, and divine grace. This sacred text is ideally recited on Thursday (Guruvar) and during Rath Yatra and Snana Yatra for enhanced blessings. The text contains 3 verses and takes around 2 minutes to recite, fitting conveniently into a daily spiritual routine. On this page, you can read the complete Jagannath Gayatri in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Jagannath Gayatri Mantra in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Invoke Lord Jagannath's blessings for moksha, spiritual wisdom, and divine grace.
